mapper.select: SELECT permission_id FROM org_role_permission WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM org_user_role WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE org_role_permission SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO org_role_permission (role_id, permission_id, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES
(#{roleId}, #{permissionId}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT u.id as userId, u.account, u.name, u.phone, d.dept_name as mainDeptName, ur.create_time FROM org_user u INNER JOIN org_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN org_department d ON u.main_dept_id = d.id WHERE ur.role_id = #{roleId} AND u.deleted = 0 AND ur.deleted = 0 ORDER BY ur.create_time DESC
